verses.14: Thooqoo fitnatakum hatha allathee kuntum bihi tastaAAjiloona
verses.16: Akhitheena ma atahum rabbuhum innahum kanoo qabla thalika muhsineena
verses.17: Kanoo qaleelan mina allayli ma yahjaAAoona
verses.23: Fawarabbi alssamai waalardi innahu lahaqqun mithla ma annakum tantiqoona
verses.24: Hal ataka hadeethu dayfi ibraheema almukrameena
verses.25: Ith dakhaloo AAalayhi faqaloo salaman qala salamun qawmun munkaroona
verses.26: Faragha ila ahlihi fajaa biAAijlin sameenin
verses.28: Faawjasa minhum kheefatan qaloo la takhaf wabashsharoohu bighulamin AAaleemin
verses.29: Faaqbalati imraatuhu fee sarratin fasakkat wajhaha waqalat AAajoozun AAaqeemun
verses.30: Qaloo kathaliki qala rabbuki innahu huwa alhakeemu alAAaleemu
verses.32: Qaloo inna orsilna ila qawmin mujrimeena
verses.35: Faakhrajna man kana feeha mina almumineena
verses.36: Fama wajadna feeha ghayra baytin mina almuslimeena
verses.37: Watarakna feeha ayatan lillatheena yakhafoona alAAathaba alaleema
verses.38: Wafee moosa ith arsalnahu ila firAAawna bisultanin mubeenin
verses.39: Fatawalla biruknihi waqala sahirun aw majnoonun
verses.40: Faakhathnahu wajunoodahu fanabathnahum fee alyammi wahuwa muleemun
verses.41: Wafee AAadin ith arsalna AAalayhimu alrreeha alAAaqeema
verses.42: Ma tatharu min shayin atat AAalayhi illa jaAAalathu kaalrrameemi
verses.43: Wafee thamooda ith qeela lahum tamattaAAoo hatta heenin
verses.44: FaAAataw AAan amri rabbihim faakhathathumu alssaAAiqatu wahum yanthuroona
verses.45: Fama istataAAoo min qiyamin wama kanoo muntasireena
verses.46: Waqawma noohin min qablu innahum kanoo qawman fasiqeena
verses.49: Wamin kulli shayin khalaqna zawjayni laAAallakum tathakkaroona
verses.50: Fafirroo ila Allahi innee lakum minhu natheerun mubeenun
verses.51: Wala tajAAaloo maAAa Allahi ilahan akhara innee lakum minhu natheerun mubeenun
verses.52: Kathalika ma ata allatheena min qablihim min rasoolin illa qaloo sahirun aw majnoonun
verses.53: Atawasaw bihi bal hum qawmun taghoona
verses.56: Wama khalaqtu aljinna waalinsa illa liyaAAbudooni
verses.57: Ma oreedu minhum min rizqin wama oreedu an yutAAimooni
verses.58: Inna Allaha huwa alrrazzaqu thoo alquwwati almateenu
verses.59: Fainna lillatheena thalamoo thanooban mithla thanoobi ashabihim fala yastaAAjiloona
verses.60: Fawaylun lillatheena kafaroo min yawmihimu allathee yooAAadoona
